name: meter-ai
description: Intelligent CLI wrapper for Claude Code — pre-task cost estimation, live status bar, budget protection

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/index.js';const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!/usr/bin/env node')){fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c)}"
